name: pointe-du-hoc
title: Pointe du Hoc, Normandy
notes: WWII US Army Ranger cliff assault. A clifftop battery: casemates and craters on an open headland above a sheer sea cliff. Chosen because its elevation (the cliff) is the whole point of the battle — it is the worked example for why real terrain wants a sim-side height layer (see docs open question Q-terrain-elevation).
